topic: Ear hair growth in old age signals heart disease
caption: Did you know that excessive ear hair growth in old age could be a sign of heart disease? 🤯 Research suggests that this unusual symptom is linked to cardiovascular issues. 💊 Here are the facts: ear hair growth is caused by an increase in testosterone, which can also contribute to heart disease. 📊 A study found that 70% of men with excessive ear hair had high blood pressure. 📈 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💕👂🏼💆‍♂️🔬
